```{=typst}
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// CONTEXTUAL RECOMMENDATION 2 — after Day 7 (Personal Awareness Plan worksheet)
// Mindset: the reader has completed the core seven-day method and is ready to be
// guided toward the next level. Positioned as a natural continuation: they now
// have a way to NOTICE the habit in the present; the recommended next step is to
// explore WHY the pattern may have formed. Layout is deliberately different from
// Recommendation 1: IMAGE ON THE LEFT as a hero, editorial COPY ON THE RIGHT,
// with premium spacing. Same brand system (ivory ground, gold keyline,
// deep-green type, gold accents). Strong-but-not-flashy CTA.
//
// UNNUMBERED editorial insert — scoped `page(footer: none)` hides the page number
// on THIS page only (the shared `wcg-nums` state is untouched, so the reflection
// and later pages keep their footer numbers), and the page is not counted toward
// the visible numbering so the lesson sequence stays continuous.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
#page(footer: none, numbering: none)[
  #counter(page).update(n => n - 1)
  #place(top + left, dx: -(mg-x - 0.55in), dy: -(mg-y - 0.5in),
    rect(width: 7.4in, height: 10in, stroke: 0.75pt + c-gold, radius: 3pt))
  #v(1fr)
  #grid(
    columns: (1fr, 1fr),
    column-gutter: 30pt,
    align: (center + horizon, left + horizon),
    // ---- LEFT: the Money Script visual (hero), uncropped ----
    [
      #image("assets/images/money-script-mockup.jpg", width: 100%)
    ],
    // ---- RIGHT: editorial recommendation ----
    [
      #set par(justify: false, leading: 0.72em, spacing: 10pt)
      #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 11pt, weight: 600, tracking: 3pt, fill: c-gold)[YOUR RECOMMENDED NEXT STEP]
      #v(12pt)
      #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), size: 24pt, weight: 700, fill: c-deep)[
        You've Identified\
        the Habit.\
        Now Explore the\
        Belief Behind It.
      ]
      #v(10pt)
      #line(length: 24%, stroke: 1pt + c-gold)
      #v(14pt)
      #set text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 10.5pt, fill: c-body)

      You've now created a personal awareness plan built around the habits,
      situations, and choices that matter most to you.

      That gives you a practical way to notice what is happening in the present.

      The next step is exploring why certain financial patterns may have formed in
      the first place.

      That's why I recommend the free Money Script presentation. It complements the
      exercises you've completed and offers a deeper perspective on the beliefs and
      repeated experiences that can quietly shape financial decisions.

      #v(16pt)
      #link("https://399ebep0yf69650bpihrv-vewe.hop.clickbank.net")[
        #box(width: 100%, fill: c-deep, radius: 6pt, inset: (x: 22pt, y: 15pt))[
          #align(center, text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 11.5pt, weight: 700, fill: c-ivory)[
            Watch the Free Money Script Presentation #sym.arrow.r
          ])
        ]
      ]
      #v(10pt)
      #text(font: ("Manrope",), style: "italic", size: 9pt, fill: c-num)[
        This recommended third-party resource contains an affiliate link.
      ]
    ],
  )
  #v(1fr)
]
```
